title: AI Procurement in a Box: Challenges and Opportunities During Implementation
summary: Applies to government procurement of AI solutions that may include generative AI tools and sets procurement considerations for data sharing with vendors, third-party data, data integrity, personally identifiable information, skills and leadership, ethics, accountability, liability, transparency, and AI procurement process readiness.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.generative_ai: Guidance for public-sector procurement of AI solutions.
theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.autonomous_smart_system: Guidance for procuring AI-enabled systems in government.

notes: Related instruments: Related to the General Policy for the Use of Artificial Intelligence
